hero_desc: We craft high-impact UGC content, striking visuals, and data-driven strategies that turn attention into measurable growth for modern brands.
services_desc: From content creation to strategic marketing — choose the package that fits your brand's needs.
cta_desc: Let's craft a strategy that elevates your digital presence and drives measurable results for your business.
login_terms: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
panel_login_desc: Sign in to manage your projects, track orders, and continue where you left off.
panel_signup_desc: Create an account and unlock exclusive tools to grow your brand with expert support.

error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
premium_section_desc: Tailor-made solutions to propel your brand forward.
premium_marketing_desc: Data-driven campaigns and authentic UGC content that amplify your brand reach and engagement.
premium_dev_desc: Custom web solutions and smart automation workflows that streamline your business operations.
premium_ai_desc: Strategic AI integration and custom models that give your business a competitive edge.
showreel_hero_desc: Zero radius. Maximum impact. An aesthetic that makes no compromises.
comparison_desc: See why brands choose GROWSTACK to scale their digital presence.
workflow_subtitle: A simple and effective process to bring your ideas to life.
workflow_step1_desc: Share your vision, goals, and expectations. We analyze your needs to define a tailored strategy.
workflow_step2_desc: We create a detailed roadmap with clear deliverables, milestones, and precise timelines.
workflow_step3_desc: Our experts produce high-quality content following your brief. You track progress in real time.
workflow_step4_desc: We deliver the final project and optimize its distribution to maximize impact on your audience.
faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq_q1: How long does a typical project take?
faq_a1: Most projects are delivered within 7 to 14 business days. The exact duration depends on complexity and revision rounds. We provide a precise timeline before starting.
faq_q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_a2: We accept credit card, bank transfer, and PayPal. Payment is split into two installments: a deposit at launch and the balance upon delivery.
faq_q3: Can I request changes after delivery?
faq_a3: Absolutely. Each project includes up to 3 revision rounds to ensure your full satisfaction. Additional modifications may be billed depending on the scope of work.
why_subtitle: What sets us apart and allows us to deliver exceptional results on every project.
why_feature1_desc: Every deliverable undergoes rigorous quality control before handover. We never compromise on the quality of our work.
why_feature2_desc: Our optimized process lets us deliver your projects in record time, without ever sacrificing the quality of the final result.
why_feature3_desc: A dedicated project manager supports you every step of the way, from brief to delivery. Available by email, phone, or video call.

guarantee_refund_desc: Not satisfied with the result? We'll refund you in full, no questions asked.

guarantee_revisions_desc: Make changes until the result is perfect. As many rounds as needed.
